name: Ivisys AB (publ)
summary: Ivisys AB (publ) develops and sells machine vision inspection systems. Its systems provide solutions for quality inspection, verification, and machine guidance. The company's products include IVISYS Pro F, IVISYS Pro V, IVISYS Pro M, IVISYS advanced conveyor inspection station, and IVISYS Pro User Interface, as well as other solutions. The company is based in Lomma, Sweden.
